descriptions: Ahrar al-Sham attended a meeting with Khorasan Group to unite against Syrian government.
edges.evidence_quote: In early November 2014, representatives from Ahrar al-Sham reportedly attended a meeting with al-Nusra Front, the Khorasan Group, the Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant, and Jund al-Aqsa, which sought to unite the groups against the Syrian government.

descriptions: Khorasan Group coordinated with Al-Nusra.
edges.evidence_quote: Khorasan, also known as the Khorasan Group, is an alleged group of senior Al-Qaeda members who operate in Syria. The group has been reported to ... co-ordinate with Al-Nusra Front

descriptions: Khorasan Group trained Al-Nusra's elite sniper unit.
edges.evidence_quote: Training is conducted in Aleppo by veteran jihadists who belong to the Khorasan Group, a collection of veteran Al-Qaeda operatives sent from Al-Qaeda strongholds along the Afghan-Pakistan border.

descriptions: ISIS–K formed an alliance with Iranian Jundullah.
edges.evidence_quote: the newly ordained ISIS–K forged significant alliances with other Sunni jihadist movements in the region to include the Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan (IMU), Islamic Movement of Turkmenistan (IMT), Uyghur East Turkestan Islamic Party (ETIP), Jamaat Ansarullah, Harakat Islami Tajikistan, and the Islamic Jihad Renaissance Party of Tajikistan (IJRPT), Hezb-e Islami Gulbuddin, and Balochi militant groups including the Pakistani Jundullah movement and Iranian Jundullah movement

descriptions: La Rosa settled in an area previously ruled by the Carones, implying displacement or rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: since the 2000s have begun a settlement in the locality of Santa Domenica di Ricadi until then ruled by the local 'ndrina of the Carones close to the Mancusos.

descriptions: The Carones are described as close to the Mancusos, indicating alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the local 'ndrina of the Carones close to the Mancusos.

descriptions: Ruga is allied with Gallace-Novella.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleate dei ... Gallace-Novella di Guardavalle

descriptions: Estacas are a level within Los Zetas, sicarios operating in squads.
edges.evidence_quote: Similar a una escuadra en el ejército mexicano, eran integrantes que operaban en la ciudad día y noche en convoyes

descriptions: Vrenna and Feudale were in conflict in the Crotone feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Crotone : scoppia nel 1973 tra la famiglia di Luigi Vrenna detto U Zirru e i Feudale.

descriptions: The Corleonesi were rivals of the Badalamenti faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Gaetano Badalamenti

descriptions: The Molluso family is considered a satellite of the Barbaro-Papalia clan, indicating a subordinate or allied relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: la famiglia Molluso è considerata da sempre «satellite» dei potentissimi Barbaro - Papalia

descriptions: Surviving members of Bloque Metro demobilized with Bloque Héroes de Granada.
edges.evidence_quote: Los miembros sobrevivientes del Bloque Metro que no se desmovilizaron con el Bloque Cacique Nutibara lo hicieron luego con el Bloque Central Bolívar o el Bloque Héroes de Granada.

descriptions: Aquino-Coluccio-Scali and Mazzaferro-Femia were in conflict in the Marina di Gioiosa Jonica feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica, fra gli Aquino-Coluccio-Scali e i Mazzaferro-Femia negli anni '70.

descriptions: FEU is allied with CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: On 17 December 2025, intense clashes were reported in Escuinapa, Sinaloa, between rival armed groups, likely involving Fuerzas Especiales Unión (FEU)— CJNG and Los Chapitos—against forces of "Grupo Flechas" of Mayito Flaco (MZ/MF).

descriptions: FEU and Grupo Flechas are on opposing sides in clashes.
edges.evidence_quote: On 17 December 2025, intense clashes were reported in Escuinapa, Sinaloa, between rival armed groups, likely involving Fuerzas Especiales Unión (FEU)— CJNG and Los Chapitos—against forces of "Grupo Flechas" of Mayito Flaco (MZ/MF).

descriptions: FEU is allied with CJNG and Los Chapitos.
edges.evidence_quote: On 17 December 2025, intense clashes were reported in Escuinapa, Sinaloa, between rival armed groups, likely involving Fuerzas Especiales Unión (FEU)— CJNG and Los Chapitos—against forces of "Grupo Flechas" of Mayito Flaco (MZ/MF).

descriptions: Sanghera Crime Group fought against Malhi-Buttar Coalition in South Slope Gang War.
edges.evidence_quote: this gang is believed to be responsible for over 100 shootings in the South Slope Gang War in Vancouver against the Malhi-Buttar Coalition.

descriptions: Jaysh al-Sunna's Hama branch merged with Ahrar al-Sham.
edges.evidence_quote: On the following day, Jaysh al-Sunna's branch in Hama merged with Ahrar al-Sham, though its northern Aleppo branch was not a part of this merger.

descriptions: The Paranza dei Bambini was allied with the Sibillo clan.
edges.evidence_quote: afferenti a un cartello camorristico formato dai giovani della famiglia Giuliano, in conflitto con i loro stessi parenti da molti anni, affiancati dai clan Sibillo, Brunetti e Amirante

descriptions: The Paranza dei Bambini was allied with the Sibillo clan.
edges.evidence_quote: affiancati dai clan Sibillo, Brunetti e Amirante

descriptions: Mazzarella and Sibillo were in a feud (faida).
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Mazzarella-Del Prete-Buonerba e i Sibillo-Giuliano

descriptions: Mazzarella was in conflict with Sibillo and Giuliano.
edges.evidence_quote: Si allearono poi con i Buonerba-Del Prete durante la faida con i Sibillo-Giuliano (2013-2015)

descriptions: Sibillo and Giuliano formed a clan together (Paranza dei Bambini).
edges.evidence_quote: i Sibillo e i Giuliano decidono di formare un clan vero e proprio reclutando ragazzini giovanissimi di età.

descriptions: Sibillo is part of Paranza dei Bambini.
edges.evidence_quote: il gruppo Giuliano-Sibillo-Brunetti-Amirante, meglio noto come Paranza dei Bambini

descriptions: Albanese-Cutellè-Tassone clashed with Ferrentino-Chindamo-Lamari-D'Agostino in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni Novanta scoppia la faida di Laureana di Borrello tra gli Albanese-Cutellè-Tassone e i Ferrentino-Chindamo-Lamari-D'Agostino

descriptions: The Mancuso ordered the murder of Chindamo members, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: il boss Giuseppe Mancuso per aiutare la 'ndrina dei Cutellè di Laureana di Borrello in faida con i Chindamo ordina l'omicidio di Vincenzo e Antonio Chindamo

descriptions: The Schiavone clan is a historical faction within the Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Per quanto riguarda le varie fazioni storiche che da sempre hanno composto l'organizzazione, gli Schiavone risulterebbero i più indeboliti.

descriptions: The Schiavone and Bidognetti clans are in conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Ci sarebbe stato un ulteriore indebolimento ai danni degli Schiavone dovuto ad un contrasto che questi avrebbero avuto con i Bidognetti

descriptions: Schiavone and Bidognetti were allies against De Falco.
edges.evidence_quote: Francesco Schiavone e Francesco Bidognetti sospettavano che Vincenzo De Falco non spartisse con loro i soldi

descriptions: Schiavone is an affiliated group of the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 vengono sequestrati beni tra Caserta e Modena per un valore complessivo di cinquanta milioni di euro agli Schiavone, gruppo affiliato dei Casalesi guidato da Francesco Schiavone.

descriptions: The Schiavone and De Falco factions were in conflict over money and power.
edges.evidence_quote: I contrasti tra gli Schiavone e i De Falco

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Raso-Albanese.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: The Mazzaferro have contacts with the Raso-Albanese.
edges.evidence_quote: ma hanno contatti anche con i Barbaro , i Calabrò, i Bruzzaniti , i Morabito e i Raso-Albanese

Schuele Boys.description: Street gang based in Buffalo, New York, founded in 2000 on Schuele Avenue. Engages in drug trafficking, robbery, extortion, contract killing, arms trafficking, and selling stolen property. Known for producing drill rap music under the label 'Gone Entertainment'. In 2017, 28 members were arrested for narcotics distribution and homicides.

descriptions: Infobox lists Schuele Boys as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bufalino crime family, Chicago Outfit, Five Families, Los Angeles crime family, Luppino crime family, Papalia crime family, Rochester crime family, Hells Angels MC, Outlaws MC, Schuele Boys

descriptions: The Schuele Boys are allied with the Buffalo crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Buffalo crime family

descriptions: The Schuele Boys have a rivalry with the East Ferry Street Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: East Ferry Street Gang

descriptions: Independent Skins is subservient to Nazi Lowriders.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of these Peckerwood gangs in California are subservient to the authority of Nazi Lowriders, which includes the punk gangs Vicious Circle and La Mirada Punks, as well as Insane White Boys, Independent Skins, Orange County Skins, and a rigid alliance with Southern California Skinhead Alliance (SoCal Skins).

descriptions: The Wanderers was a constituent gang that made up the original South Brooklyn Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the gangs that made up the original South Brooklyn Boys were the South Brooklyn Devils, the Garfield Place Boys, the SB Angels, SB Diapers, the Wanderers, the Degraw St boys, the Sackett St Boys, the Butler Gents, the Gowanus Boys, the Kane St. Midgets, The Little Gents, and the Young Savages.

descriptions: SNUF and Kokang Force merged to form SSA.
edges.evidence_quote: The SSIA, the SNUF, and the Kokang Force agreed to merge into the Shan State Army (SSA) in 1964.

descriptions: SSIA and SNUF merged to form SSA.
edges.evidence_quote: The SSIA, the SNUF, and the Kokang Force agreed to merge into the Shan State Army (SSA) in 1964.

descriptions: Leisure family was affiliated with and under control of the Italian-American St. Louis crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Syrian-Lebanese crime families in St. Louis were affiliated with and under the control of the Italian-American St. Louis crime family headed by Anthony Giordano.

descriptions: Michaels family was affiliated with and under control of the Italian-American St. Louis crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Syrian-Lebanese crime families in St. Louis were affiliated with and under the control of the Italian-American St. Louis crime family headed by Anthony Giordano.

descriptions: Albanese, together with Raso and Gullace, clashed with Marvaso in the 1960s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni sessanta a Cittanova insieme ai Raso e ai Gullace si sono scontrati con i Facchineri , i Marvaso e i Monteleone.

descriptions: Facchineri-Varone were allied with Marvaso in the 1960s faida.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni sessanta scoppia la prima faida fra i Facchineri-Varone(alleati ai Marvaso e Monteleone) e i Raso, gli Albanese , i Gullace e i De Raco.

descriptions: The Corleonesi were rivals of the Inzerillo faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Salvatore Inzerillo

descriptions: T-Block is listed as an ally of Peckham Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: CWS, T-Block , ABM (All Bout Money), Firehouse Crew, OTB, Wooly Road Youngers

edges.target: True Knights of the Ku Klux Klan
descriptions: The True Knights of the Ku Klux Klan is a group associated with the third Klan.
edges.evidence_quote: In April 1997, FBI agents arrested four members of the True Knights of the Ku Klux Klan in Dallas for conspiracy to commit robbery and for conspiring to blow up a natural gas processing plant.
